HEADROOM // DESKTOP

Headroom

Starting the bundled engine…

connecting

HEADROOM // SETTINGS

$ headroom configure

Validated locally, committed atomically, and applied to both desktop surfaces.

[APPEARANCE]
[ROUTING + COLLECTION]
[PROVIDER TOOLS]
[DESKTOP]

Login launch is off until explicitly enabled.

[NOTIFICATIONS // PREPARED]

Preferences are stored now. Native alerts and macOS permission requests arrive in the notification milestone; both remain off by default.

⌘, settings · ⌘R refresh · ⌘W close · ⌘Q quit

HEADROOM // ROUTING

$ headroom route --explain

The bundled engine selects the account and explains every skip using the CLI’s final safety gates.

Choose a model family to prove its current route.

[ENGINE SELECTION] No eligible account

$ headroom status

Waiting for a sanitized snapshot

+ add account
